'''Slitherettes''' were a [[species]] of [[snake]] that hailed from a [[Slitherette homeworld|distant]] [[Outer Rim Territories|Outer Rim]] [[planet]]. The [[limb]]less [[reptile]]s could be thirty [[centimeter]]s long and bright [[Color|orange]] in color. They possessed small fangs. <ref name="ACGAS" />

{{Creature-stub}}
